name: Chocolate Sunrise
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Strain pineapple juice from the slices and set aside.
3. Cut pineapple slices into quarters.
4. In a large bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and sugar.
5. Add strained pineapple juice and egg; stir until you have a smooth batter.
6. Gradually incorporate cocoa powder and corn syrup, mixing thoroughly.
7. Add margarine and beat the mixture until fully combined.
8. On a greased cookie sheet, drop rounded spoonfuls of batter about 1/2 inch apart.
9. Place one pineapple quarter on top of each cookie and press firmly into place.
10. Bake for 15 minutes.
This recipe was created a few months ago to cater to someone living with diabetes, ensuring minimal sugar intake while still enjoying delicious treats.
